# 石頭的coding之路

> 專注於 PostgreSQL、軟體工程、原始碼與 AI 的技術筆記與實作分享

## About

- Author: Daniel Shih
- Topics: PostgreSQL, Software Engineering, Source Code Analysis, AI, C#, ASP.NET, Rust
- Language: Traditional Chinese (zh-tw)
- URL: https://isdaniel.github.io/

## Content Index

- [All Posts](https://isdaniel.github.io/archives/)
- [Categories](https://isdaniel.github.io/categories/)
- [Tags](https://isdaniel.github.io/tags/)
- [Full Content for LLMs](https://isdaniel.github.io/llms-full.txt)
- [Atom Feed](https://isdaniel.github.io/atom.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://isdaniel.github.io/sitemap.xml)

## Key Topics

### PostgreSQL
Deep dives into PostgreSQL internals, indexing strategies, query optimization, replication, and source code analysis.

### Software Engineering
ASP.NET MVC internals, C# design patterns, HTTP pipeline architecture, and web API development.

### AI & Machine Learning
Model Context Protocol (MCP), AI application development, and integration patterns.

### Source Code Analysis
Detailed walkthroughs of open-source framework internals including ASP.NET, IIS, and database engines.
